results.command:
bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail
FR=/data/tmp/frankenredis-coralox-pass171-target/release/frankenredis
BENCH=/data/tmp/frankenredis-coralox-pass171-target/release/fr-bench
ART=artifacts/optimization/frankenredis-coralox-pass171
PORT=24521
"$FR" --port "$PORT" >"$ART/hset-baseline-server-last.log" 2>&1 & pid=$!
trap "kill $pid 2>/dev/null || true" EXIT
sleep 0.25
"$BENCH" --port "$PORT" --workload hset --requests 500000 --clients 50 --pipeline 16 --keyspace 100000 --json-out "$ART/hset-baseline-last.json" >/dev/null
kill "$pid" 2>/dev/null || true
wait "$pid" 2>/dev/null || true
'
